/usr/bin/g++ -fsanitize=thread -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Networking-Tool.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/Networking-Tool.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Networking-Tool.dir/src/server.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Networking-Tool.dir/src/session.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Networking-Tool.dir/src/room.cpp.o" -o Networking-Tool  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.90.0 -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.90.0
